overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence showing a hooded character exploring a dark rocky canyon at night. The character walks along a cliff edge overlooking water, passes a torch, and continues through ancient stone ruins under a cloudy indigo sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow canyon toward the distant ruins

entered.detail: tall rock formation forming the left canyon wall
tall rock formation forming the right canyon wall
tall ruined stone tower visible in the distance against the night sky
narrow winding dirt trail through the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow enclosed canyon with steep rock walls on both sides. The path is a dirt trail leading toward distant ancient ruins visible against the dark blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge overlook with water view

events.description: canyon opens to reveal large body of water below the cliff edge
character stops walking and looks down at the water below

agents.ego_description: standing at the cliff edge looking down at the water and across at distant campfire lights

entered.detail: dark water surface visible below the cliff edge
flickering orange light source across the water indicating a distant camp

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens to a wide overlook revealing a large body of water below. The character stops at the cliff edge to observe the view, looking down at the water and across to distant campfire lights. The ancient ruins tower is now visible to the left.

events.description: character turns away from the water view and continues along the cliffside path

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliffside path past a burning torch mounted on the right

entered.detail: bright orange flame in a stone sconce illuminating the path
weathered ancient stone wall with carved blocks

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the water and continues along the cliffside path, passing a bright torch mounted on the right. Ancient stone ruins line the left side of the path as the character moves deeper into the canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert canyon with distant ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open canyon toward the ancient ruins on the horizon

entered.detail: steep rock face forming the distant left boundary
steep rock face forming the distant right boundary

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide open canyon with steep rock walls in the distance. The path stretches forward toward the ancient ruins tower now centered on the horizon. The torch and stone walls are left behind as the character continues the journey through the moonlit desert landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a restrictive rocky canyon that gradually opens into a vast, moonlit desert landscape. It begins with the character navigating a narrow dirt trail enclosed by steep rock walls, moving steadily toward distant ruins under a dark blue night sky. As the canyon walls recede, the scene expands into a wide overlook where the character pauses at a cliff edge to observe a large body of water and distant campfire lights. The camera then follows the character as they turn back to the path, passing a bright mounted torch and ancient stone ruins that line the cliffside. Finally, the environment opens further into a wide canyon, leaving the ruins and torch behind as the path stretches forward toward a towering stone structure centered on the horizon.
